name: Zucchini and Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Melt the 2 tablespoons of butter in a skillet and sauté the zucchini and remaining filling ingredients over high heat until the zucchini loses its color. Place in the pie shell and bake for 15 minutes.
3. Reduce the oven temperature to 375°F.
4. Make the custard by creaming the 6 tablespoons of butter with the sugar. Add the 2 whole eggs and 2 extra egg yolks alternately with the flour, mixing well. Then add the lemon juice; do not worry if it looks funny. Pour the custard over the zucchini and bake for an additional 35 minutes.
